seoParkingPrices.kicker: M Park Sarajevo · prices intent only
seoParkingPrices.h1: Sarajevo airport parking prices — tiers and stay comparison
intro: This page answers one question only: how much does private parking near Sarajevo Airport cost and how rates change by stay length. Security, location, and step-by-step process live on separate URLs.
M Park uses three tiers: KM 9/day for 1–9 days, KM 8 for 10–14, KM 7 from day 15. Shuttle is bundled into the rate — protection details sit on the safety page.

paragraphs: Days 1–9: KM 9 daily. Days 10–14: KM 8 daily. From day 15: KM 7 daily. No hidden shuttle line item — terminal transfer is inside the same daily rate.
The reservation form counts calendar days between arrival and return and quotes instantly. Enter accurate dates so the total matches your trip.
Weekend or short business trips usually sit in the KM 9/day band. Example: five days = KM 45 total for bay plus included airport shuttle.
For taxi comparison see the blog article parking vs taxi — this page stays on tariffs only.
From day 10 the rate drops to KM 8; from day 15 to KM 7 — built in, no haggling. Planning multi-week trips? Read the long-term parking blog guide; here we keep the maths.
Seventeen days blends KM 8 days 10–14 plus KM 7 from day 15 — materially lower average than a full week at the top tier.

sections.h2: What the daily rate includes (without repeating other topics)
paragraphs: Bay on private parking plus complimentary shuttle to Sarajevo Airport. CCTV is part of the offer but technical security detail is only on the safety page.
Payment timing is confirmed with your booking — no shuttle surprise add-ons.
Open online booking, enter dates and contact — estimate before submit. Questions: +387 61 512 152 or WhatsApp.
Process steps on how airport parking works. Address and directions on parking near the airport.

faqStructured.question: What is the rate for seven days?
faqStructured.answer: Seven days falls in 1–9 band at KM 9/day — KM 63 total. Exact quote in the form with your dates.

faqStructured.question: When does KM 7/day start?
faqStructured.answer: From calendar day 15 of your stay.

faqStructured.question: Is shuttle extra?
faqStructured.answer: No — included in the daily tier.

faqStructured.question: Can I see price before booking?
faqStructured.answer: Yes — instant estimate in the reservation form.

faqStructured.question: Where is parking vs taxi comparison?
faqStructured.answer: Blog article parking vs taxi — this URL is tariffs only.
